title: cereus lanatus subsp. sericatus
intro: Cereus lanatus subsp. sericatus, also known as the prickly pear cactus, is a plant species within the cactus family that is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cereus lanatus subsp. sericatus include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting digestive health, as well as potentially lowering cholesterol and blood sugar levels. The plant can be prepared for herbal use in various forms, including extracts, teas, and topical creams, which can be obtained from the plant's flowers, stems, and fruits.
